floor: a floor surface in a university department building
a walking floor area in a corridor or room
wall: a wall in a university department building
a vertical wall separating rooms and corridors
ceiling: a ceiling in a university department building
an indoor ceiling surface above a room
a ceiling plane with lights and fixtures
door: a door in a university department building
a flat vertical door panel in a doorway
window: a window in an indoor building
a glass window on a wall
chair: a chair in an office or classroom
an office chair with legs or wheels
table: a table in a university room
a meeting table or work table
desk: a work desk with a flat top
cabinet: a control cabinet or storage cupboard
shelf: a storage shelf against a wall
whiteboard: a whiteboard mounted on a wall
a flat writing board in a classroom or office
computer monitor: a computer monitor on a desk
computer: a computer tower or workstation computer
computer equipment on or under a desk
workstation: a desk workstation with monitor and equipment
plant: a decorative plant in a pot
bottle: a bottle on a table or shelf
coffee machine: a coffee maker on a counter
a small appliance for making coffee
trash bin: a waste bin on the floor
a garbage bin or recycling bin
projector screen: a projector screen on a wall
a pull down screen for presentations
water cup: a cup on a desk or table
printer: a printing device on a table or stand
elevator: a lift door with metal panels
other: a miscellaneous object in the scene
an object that is not one of the listed classes
